description: Establishes registration, disclosure, and enforcement requirements for Sky Forum accounts used in a governance capacity, so the community can trust that posts made on behalf of an entity come from its authorized representatives.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
